MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT J.S. INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING CORPORATION'S Motion To Transfer Venue is off calendar. The case has been transferred to San Mateo County Superior Court.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)
